name: Vegan Moussaka
recipeIngredient: 1 pouch lowfat tofu mixed with 1 box tofu burger mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the eggplant into 1/4-inch disks and lay them on an absorbent cloth or paper towel. Sprinkle with salt and allow the eggplant to "perspire" for 10 minutes. Turn the disk over and repeat. Rinse lightly in cold water using a colander.
2. Prepare the casserole by covering the bottom with just 3-4 tablespoons of tomato sauce. Brush each disk (both sides) with soysauce and place them in a preheated, non-stick fry pan. Fry until the eggplant turns transparent and begins browning. As each disk is done, place it on the bottom of the lasagna dish until the whole bottom is covered.
3. Add another 3-4 tablespoons of tomato sauce to cover the eggplant and spoon the tofu burger mixture on top. Arrange the potatoes in a layer on top (1/4-inch slices).
4. Pour the vanilla-flavored soymilk into a large saucepan and heat (almost to boiling). Make a paste with some of the soymilk and flour, then mix the paste with the rest of the soymilk.
5. Add the nutmeg and paste to the soymilk and begin stirring. Eventually, the soymilk will thicken. Pour this onto the casserole and bake at 300°F for 30 minutes or until the top casserole is browned.
Makes: 6 to 8 servings
